---
title: "Changes to the configuration of angiography equipment to reduce exposure to ionizing radiation in FGI procedures"
date: 2025-12-01
author:
  - name: Da Silva Jornada, Tiago
  - name: Campos, Laélia
  - name: Santos, Esdras
  - name: Leyton, Fernando
  - name: Souza, Divanízia N.
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Applied Radiation and Isotopes"
  volume: 226
  doi: "10.1016/j.apradiso.2025.112141"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Changes to the configuration of angiography equipment to reduce exposure to ionizing radiation in FGI procedures</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
